policy: После значимой реализации добавляйте событие: npm run feed:append (или PR в ecosystem-implementation-feed.json). CI-автозапись — следующий шаг.

items.title: AI orchestration bridge — architecture review queue
items.summary: aion-project: /operations/reviews + /operations/review-queue, architecture-review-queue.json SoT, POST/PATCH /api/architecture-reviews, structured ChatGPT packets, npm run review:request, feed linkage. Owner observer-only.
items.reasoning: End manual owner relay; Cursor self-escalates via portal queue while autonomous execution continues.

partiallyDone: 🟨 ChatGPT API auto-ingest of results (manual PATCH for now)

items.title: Live autonomous execution visibility (/operations/live)
items.summary: execution-runtime-state.json SoT, GET/PATCH /api/execution-runtime, /operations/live panel (8s poll, health badges), npm run execution:phase|heartbeat|waiting-review for Cursor terminal logs. Owner observes phase/reasoning/files without ChatGPT relay.
items.reasoning: Eliminates false idle perception; waiting_review explicit when Apply pending; heartbeat staleness honest on Vercel build snapshot.

partiallyDone: 🟨 Sub-second prod updates without push (needs KV/Supabase)

items.title: Shift analytics backfill + route efficiency from snapshots
items.summary: aion-driver: backfillMissingShiftAnalytics rebuilds ShiftAnalyticsSnapshot from shift history + GPS sessions (no fake data); 24h cooldown; wired into historical hook. Median route km/h (moving) on intelligence strip. Constitution v2: owner observes /operations/* without ChatGPT relay.
items.task: Driver Intelligence — snapshot backfill + route efficiency
items.reasoning: Legacy shifts with GPS but no snapshot now feed rollups/stop zones without duplicate engines. Route metric from canonical snapshot.route only.
items.runtimeImpact: Dashboard refresh backfills up to 32 shifts then recomputes rollups/zones

technicalDebt: Driver git remote must not target portal repo

stillMissing: Device field validation of backfill counts

items.title: GPS stop zone patterns (text-only) + portal/driver repo safety
items.summary: aion-driver: computeStopZonePatterns clusters real GpsStopPoint data (120m), outputs explainable Russian insights (waiting windows, weekday idle, high-idle coords). aion-project: verify-portal-deploy-safety + driver verify-repo-safety blocks portal overwrite from Expo root.
items.task: Driver Intelligence — zone patterns without heatmaps
items.reasoning: Text intelligence from GPS stops + ShiftAnalyticsSnapshot window only; no synthetic demand or heatmap layers. Isolated deploy safety for portal vs driver.
items.runtimeImpact: DriverIntelligenceStrip shows stop zone insights with evidence strings

fullyDone: ✅ Portal/driver repo safety scripts + CI gates
technicalDebt: Driver origin must not point at portal repo (repo:verify:push)

items.title: Historical driver rollups from shift analytics snapshots
items.summary: aion-driver: computeHistoricalDriverRollups aggregates persisted ShiftAnalyticsSnapshot (30d median profit/idle, weekday patterns, hour-of-day windows); useHistoricalDriverRollups + DriverIntelligenceStrip dashboard lines. No heatmaps, no duplicate math in UI.
items.task: Driver Intelligence Core — multi-shift historical rollups
items.reasoning: Single SoT: post-shift snapshots; cross-shift patterns without fake recommendations or parallel heuristic engines.
items.runtimeImpact: Dashboard intelligence strip reads snapshot rollups after ≥2 ended shifts
stillMissing: Zone stop patterns from GPS clusters

items.title: Post-shift analytics engine + idle/time intelligence
items.summary: aion-driver: ShiftAnalyticsSnapshot (shift/route/idle/time/profit) persisted on endShift; hourly work buckets from real income+GPS; timeline grouped (idle-heavy/strong/weak); headless pending GPS by shiftId on disk + flush on resumeShift.
items.reasoning: Precomputed snapshots avoid live recalc; no fake AI recommendations; cold-start orphan prevention via persisted pending headless queue.
items.runtimeImpact: Analytics read from storage; gateway resumeShift async flush

partiallyDone: 🟨 Shifts before this release lack backfilled snapshots
technicalDebt: Backfill analytics for old shifts optional

items.title: Route timeline UI + headless GPS → ingestion gateway
items.summary: aion-driver: headless FGS batches flow through gpsIngestionGateway.ingestHeadlessRecords after mergeHeadlessGpsLocationsIntoStore; dedupe/waterline in gpsTripStorage; RouteSessionSummary on finalize; RouteTimelineScreen at /driver/route-timeline.
items.reasoning: Single write path for trip store; headless uses same waterline rules as distance merge; UI lists real sessions without heatmap.
items.runtimeImpact: Headless GPS points append to ShiftGpsSession; route summary at shift end

partiallyDone: 🟨 Active shift without gateway resume on cold start

stillMissing: Field validation headless vs foreground point counts

items.title: OCR queue hardening — primary execution path
items.summary: aion-driver: runOcrThroughQueue on Import screen, serialized queue storage, exponential backoff, dedupe/replay, stuck recovery, OcrQueueProcessor drain on reconnect.
items.reasoning: Queue is now the only import OCR path; inline pipeline removed from UI; failures stay in queue for replay.

items.title: Editable Priority Control Panel + owner auth
items.summary: aion-project: /operations/priorities editor, OPERATIONS_OWNER_SECRET cookie auth, PUT /api/strategic-priorities with dependency validation + feed audit + roadmap target sync. aion-driver: GpsStorageAdapter + GpsIngestionGateway (architecture prep).
items.reasoning: Owner strategic control without micro-TZ; autonomous loop re-reads priorities after save.

partiallyDone: 🟨 Supabase snapshot on Vercel without service key

stillMissing: Production Vercel FS write — use SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE

items.title: GPS trip history store (v1 foundation)
items.summary: aion-driver: ShiftGpsSession AsyncStorage, buffered GPS append on location ticks, stop detection (3min/80m), finalize on endShift with gpsPointCount/gpsStopCount on Shift record. Dep route-gps-store → done.
items.reasoning: Autonomous roadmap-first: geospatial foundation from real ticks only; enables route intelligence and honest heatmaps later.
items.runtimeImpact: persists GPS points per shift offline; no cloud sync yet

partiallyDone: 🟨 Headless GPS merge into trip store
technicalDebt: ⚠ Headless FGS points not yet merged into trip store

items.title: Strategic priority control + dependency graph on portal
items.summary: MASTER Constitution §8–10: strategic-priorities.json SoT, /operations/priorities, /api/strategic-priorities, dependency validation helpers, execution-audit merges owner directive; cursor constitution rule.
items.reasoning: Владелец управляет приоритетами через JSON без micro-TZ; Cursor адаптирует autonomous loop; overlay/heatmap blocked until deps satisfied.

items.title: Driver Intelligence Core: rental-adjusted profit + dashboard strip
items.summary: aion-driver: RentalEconomics (day/week/month + fixed ops/deposit), unified operationalCosts в ActiveShiftRuntime, snapshot на endShift, Settings UI, DriverIntelligenceStrip, orb HUD after-costs. Roadmap SoT: PRIMARY driver intelligence.
items.task: MASTER §9–10 rental economics + unified profit path
items.reasoning: Первый production slice Driver OS: реальная чистая прибыль с арендой без fake analytics; единый runtime path.
items.runtimeImpact: profitAfterCosts in live shift + orb HUD

items.title: AI Execution Audit System on operations portal

items.reasoning: Портал — SoT для автономного Cursor: видимость решений, блокеров, runtime confidence и validation без выдуманных метрик; данные из ecosystem JSON + feed.
